summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for weROI business website remodel. All major features working correctly including Lead Magnet funnel, survey flow, PDF viewer, and Calendly integration.

issues: ESLint warning: ref.current cleanup in useEffect - minor code quality issue, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx line 37: ESLint warning about ref.current in cleanup function - should copy ref.current to variable inside effect for proper cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. Lead Magnet funnel flow: Homepage CTA -> /growth-survey (2 questions with currency selector) -> /struggling-to-scale (PDF viewer + sticky CTA) -> /book-call (Calendly). PDF embedded via iframe from customer-assets URL. Calendly integration working.

homepage: Hero headline 'We Engineer Revenue. You Own the System.' displays correctly
Hero CTA 'Unlock Your Free Custom Growth Guide' button present and clickable
Three service pillars displayed: AI Audit & Transformation, Growth Systems Applications, Scale Partnerships
Process section shows Align→Diagnose→Design→Deliver framework (4 steps)
Navigation links work: Services, Our Process, Results
Footer displays correctly with social links and contact info
growth_survey_page: Question 1: Growth bottleneck options (6 options) present
Question 2: Revenue goal with currency selector appears after Q1 selection
Currency selector has all required options: USD, GBP, EUR, JMD, CAD, AUD
struggling_to_scale_page: Hero section with 'Struggling to Scale' title present
PDF section with embedded iframe viewer
Download PDF button links to correct PDF URL
Sticky CTA bar at bottom with 'Apply Now' button
book_call_page: Calendly widget loads after answering questions
